name_en: Can't resist this beautiful Gucci bag?
name_cn:
Can't resist this beautiful Gucci bag?
GG Marmont series, the elegant and exquisite design has captured the hearts of many girls!
It is also a versatile item that global influencers must have! Super great!
Model: 443497 Lake Green Velvet. Dimensions: 26*15*7.
